name: Greek Yogurt Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Clove garlic, peeled and forced through a press
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
4 Chicken breast halves on the bone, skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yogurt, lemon peel and juice, oregano, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Place the chicken breasts in a dish and spread about 1/4 cup of the yogurt sauce over each piece. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for several hours or overnight. Store the remaining yogurt sauce in the refrigerator.
3. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Place the chicken on a rack in a baking pan and bake for 30 minutes. Increase the oven temperature to broil and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, until the chicken is browned on top and cooked through.
4. Spoon the yogurt sauce over the chicken and serve.
